violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as pork and shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce and prepared foods) in the 1-door reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection and guidance was provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Salmon and mahi filet were observed thawed in their original intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged in ROP packaging shall be completely removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit and were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Guidance document was provided during the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Plumbing in the basement storage area was observed to be leaking into a refuse receptacle. Improper repair or maintenance of any portion of the plumbing system may result in potential health hazards such as cross connections, backflow, or leakage. Improper repair or maintenance may result in the creation of obnoxious odors or nuisances, and may result in contamination of food, equipment, and single-service or single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
